autoscaling.scalingpolicy.metricdimensio: `MetricDimension` specifies a name/value pair that is part of the identity of a CloudWatch metric for the `Dimensions` property of the [AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy CustomizedMetricSpecification](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-autoscaling-scalingpolicy-customizedmetricspecification.html) property type. Duplicate dimensions are not allowed.
